title: Imperial IDE operational station truth fix, read-only no-dirty discipline, and daily operations shell
mission_summary: Fix the truth and cleanliness issues discovered in the Operational Station UX hardening smoke, then advance the station toward a daily-use operational shell. The task must make read-only station commands non-mutating, move inspection receipts to ignored runtime channels, make the TUI show the real 12-servitor roster as the primary view, repair command palette integrity if needed, reduce truncated JSON as a primary UX, and build a guided daily operations flow for creating, building, validating, registering, handing off, tracking, and closing tasks.

strategic_intent.owner_goal: The Owner should operate the system through Imperial IDE without manual ZIP hunting, without read-only commands dirtying tracked reports, and without misleading UI state.
strategic_intent.fix_first: Truth fixes and no-dirty read-only discipline are mandatory before live registration promotion.
strategic_intent.daily_ops: Imperial IDE should become a daily operational shell for task creation, taskpack management, launch cards, handoff, reports, receipts, safety, git closure, and next actions.
strategic_intent.tui: Workbench TUI remains the primary fast operator console and must show the real servitor roster.
strategic_intent.gui: Workbench GUI remains visual cockpit and must be wired to the same station state.
strategic_intent.cli: CLI remains scriptable backend and must be JSON-valid, command-palette-valid, and non-mutating for read-only commands.
strategic_intent.safety: Real servitor execution, live LLM backend, arbitrary shell, destructive cleanup, and remote contours remain gated.

source_context_to_consider: Observed issue: TUI still displays legacy Alpha/Beta/Gamma even while claiming the real roster is primary
Observed issue: read-only CLI inspection commands modify tracked report receipts and create dirty_count growth
Observed issue: command palette output around taskpack-copy-path and handoff-card must be verified for structural integrity
Observed issue: TUI still relies on truncated JSON in several screens

organ_route.DOCTRINARIUM: truth vocabulary, candidate versus canon contract, read-only meaning, no-overclaim rules
organ_route.OFFICIO_AGENTIS: owner-facing summaries, Russian guide, workflow labels, handoff copy blocks
organ_route.ASTRONOMICON: local registration truth, dry-run versus live state, current expected task visibility
organ_route.ADMINISTRATUM: receipt accounting, runtime receipt policy, report artifact policy, closure ledger
organ_route.MECHANICUS: command palette validation, no-dirty read-only enforcement, validators, command policy
organ_route.INQUISITION: fake-green prevention, dirty-state audit, safety assertions, secret and runtime staging block
organ_route.STRATEGIUM: daily operations workflow design, next-action ladder, operator station usability
organ_route.SCHOLA_IMPERIALIS: operator training, guided workflow docs, smoke recipes

cyrillic_in_taskpack.scope: MANIFEST.json, TASK_SPEC.md, ACCEPTANCE_GATES.md, OUTPUT_REQUIREMENTS.md, TASK_ROUTE_MANIFEST_TEMPLATE.json, TASK_START_ACK_TEMPLATE.json, BLUEPRINTS/*.md

localization_exception.scope: owner-facing runtime files only after Officio role entry
localization_exception.forbidden_scope: taskpack internal root files and BLUEPRINTS

allowed_when: command_palette.json validates and help output is structurally valid
read-only commands do not modify tracked files
inspection receipts are written to ignored runtime or are disabled for read-only calls
TUI real agent roster primary view shows the 12 servitors, not Alpha/Beta/Gamma
legacy capsule display is clearly debug-only if still present
TUI summary mode no longer relies on truncated JSON as the only usable output
Taskpack Manager can list, inspect, validate, open/copy, and prepare dry-run/live promotion review
Live Registration Promotion remains owner-confirmed and is not auto-run in smoke
Safety Center confirms real execution, live LLM, unsafe shell, arbitrary shell, VM2, VM3, and destructive cleanup remain gated
dirty classifier distinguishes report artifacts, runtime artifacts, old unrelated artifacts, secrets, local configs, and stage candidates
no secrets or local configs are staged
runtime paths are ignored or explicitly unstaged
forbidden_push_cases: read-only commands still dirty tracked reports after fix
legacy Alpha/Beta/Gamma remains the primary TUI agent view
command palette is invalid or help output is malformed
failed validation without explicit BLOCK verdict
destructive cleanup or delete without owner batch approval
live LLM backend enabled with secrets

known_issues_to_fix: TUI Agents screen visually shows Alpha/Beta/Gamma while claiming real roster is primary
read-only commands modify tracked report receipt files after push
command_palette help output must be checked around taskpack-copy-path and handoff-card
several TUI screens still show truncated JSON instead of usable summary plus full view action
Git Closure needs exact operator actions for stage, ignore, quarantine, or leave alone
Live Registration Promotion needs a review screen that is useful but does not auto-promote
primary_outputs: dirty classifier v2 with exact actions
